name: txt.txid.uk
description: Text-only mirror of txid.uk family sites. Brutalist, HTML-first, zero-framework.

scripts.dev: node src/build.mjs && echo 'Serve dist/ with any static server'
scripts.deploy: npm run build && npx wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name=txt-txid-uk --branch=main && npm run health && notify-deploy.sh txt.txid.uk
